title: Xentara Security File
description: The root of the Xentara security file

serverCertificate.title: TLS Server Certificate
serverCertificate.description: Server certificate paths for TLS servers. Can be omitted to use the default paths.

certificatePath.title: TLS certificate path
certificatePath.description: The relative or absolute path to the TLS server certificate.

privateKeyPath.title: TLS certificate path
privateKeyPath.description: The relative or absolute path to the private key file belonging to the TLS server certificate.

roles.title: Roles
roles.description: User roles for configuring access to features and elements

items.title: Role
items.description: A user role for configuring access to features and elements

UUID.title: UUID
UUID.description: The unique UUID of the role

items.title: Entitlement
items.description: A custom entitlements for fine-tuning access

UUID.title: UUID
UUID.description: The unique UUID of the entitlement

default.title: Default Access
default.description: The default access to use if no ACL specifies an access

entries.title: ACL Entries
entries.description: The entries in the access control list

items.title: ACL Entry
items.description: An entry in an access control list

role.title: Role
role.description: The role this entry applies to

allow.title: Allow List
allow.description: The list of entitlements to allow for this role

items.title: Allowed Entitlement
items.description: An entitlement to allow for this role

deny.title: Deny List
deny.description: The list of entitlements to deny for this role

items.title: Denied Entitlement
items.description: An entitlement to deny for this role

inherit.title: Inherit Default ACL
inherit.description: Whether the default configuration for the ACL entries should be inherited
